kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! Your diesel shop is running at full torque. Let's keep those big rigs and diesels serviced and back to work.
quickActions: Generate a repair estimate for a truck
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for a diesel repair business. You help manage diesel repair tickets, track heavy-duty parts inventory, schedule services, coordinate fleet maintenance, and handle customer communication. You understand diesel services including injector repair, turbo service, DPF cleaning, DEF system service, engine rebuilds, and emission system diagnostics.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your diesel repair and service specialists. How can we help you today?
commonReasons: Ask about DPF cleaning or regen
Report a diesel engine warning light

steps.title: Shop details
steps.description: Enter your diesel shop name, address, and contact info

steps.title: Services offered
steps.description: Select your diesel services (injectors, turbo, DPF, engine rebuild, etc.)

steps.title: Vehicle types
steps.description: What diesel vehicles do you service (pickups, semi trucks, equipment)?

steps.title: Operating hours
steps.description: Set your shop hours and emergency service availability

steps.title: Brand & website
steps.description: Upload your logo and set up your online presence

steps.title: Connect tools
steps.description: Link your diesel parts suppliers, diagnostic tools, and review platforms

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for a diesel repair business.
capabilities: Create and manage diesel repair service tickets
Track heavy-duty parts inventory and ordering
Schedule diesel service and fleet maintenance appointments
Generate repair estimates for trucks and diesel vehicles
Coordinate fleet maintenance schedules and PM intervals
Send repair status updates and completion notifications
Run revenue and average repair order reports
Track DOT inspection and compliance records
Manage core returns for diesel components
